title: How to share the dashboard outside of the monday.com?
excerpt: How can I share a dashboard (there I have in this dashboard only tables) for people who don’t have a monday.com account? View where everygone can see date. I can’t everyone create an account on monday.com because it will…

posts.author: r220 (Rafael)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I share a dashboard (there I have in this dashboard only tables) for people who don’t have a monday.com account? View where everygone can see date. I can’t everyone create an account on monday.com because it will be displayed in general availability. I was thinking some kind of short circuit with some code.io app or something. I’m mainly talking about the presentation of the table and the possibility of filtering it for people who don’t have an account on monday.com

posts.author: MJ-AIFS (MJ)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are interested in doing a similar thing. Is there any way to share a view only view of a dashboard or embed a view anywhere?
Thanks
MJ

posts.author: r220 (Rafael)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s what I’m trying to find out For now, I’m testing the coda.io tool, because monday.com doesn’t offer such an option (probably it’s about $$$ to delete literally everyone for seeing data)

posts.author: r220 (Rafael)
posts.cookedHtml: coda and monday.com is not working. The better app is Airtable, because have more integration. Monday.com is to close.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @r220 @MJ-AIFS

While waiting for Monday’s Product team to implement this, you can use an add-on such as Analytics & Reports by Screenful . You can use it to create custom charts with your Monday data and compile them into Reports . The reports can then be shared with anyone in your organization via email or Slack as a PDF on a custom schedule. Here’s what it looks like:

report_share1380×776 85.8 KB

You can configure everything once, and your manager will start receiving weekly project status reports that are automatically generated with the most up-to-date data.

You can learn more about this add-on, or start a free trial to give it a try with your own data.

posts.author: KKlinger (Kyle Klinger)
posts.cookedHtml: @r220 @MJ-AIFS Have you all tried any 3rd party apps for this? It seems like Monday is standing their ground on this and won’t provide a share link for dashboards. I’m looking for suggestion on which apps work the best for sharing dashboard views to clients via a link and not a Monday account. Much appreciated!
